info.name: k6 – Place Order (Guest Checkout) · Platypus AU
info.description:
End-to-end guest checkout for Platypus AU staging, exported from src/scenarios/place-order.ts.

Dataset: src/data/products-platypus.json + src/data/addresses.json

Run order: Step 1 → 2 → 3a → 4 → 5 → 6 → 7 → 8 → 9

All cartId / variantSku / carrierCode / methodCode variables are auto-set by test scripts — just run steps in order.

variable.description: Parent configurable SKU (prod-001 · Mens Cure Shoes). Other options from products-platypus.json: 302361WNW.WHT · 26422322.PNK · 300660XKSK.BLK · 27875001.BLK · ADYS400094XKWR.BLK
Auto-set by Step 2 – first IN_STOCK child variant SKU
Guest email for checkout (mirrors randomEmail() in place-order.ts)
Auto-set by Step 1 – masked guest cart ID
Auto-set by Step 5 – home-delivery carrier code
Auto-set by Step 5 – home-delivery method code
Payment method code. Default: checkmo (Check/Money Order). Run Step 8 and check console for available_payment_methods on this store.
Auto-set by Step 9 – order number from successful placeOrder

request.description: Creates an anonymous guest cart. The masked cart ID is auto-saved to `{{cartId}}`.

exec: console.warn('[Step 2] No IN_STOCK variant found. Fallback to:', variants[0].product.sku, '- add-to-cart may fail.');
console.error('[Step 2] No variants found for SKU:', pm.collectionVariables.get('parentSku'), '- try a different parentSku.');

request.description:
Fetches variants for `{{parentSku}}` and auto-saves the first IN_STOCK child SKU to `{{variantSku}}`.

Available Platypus AU SKUs (from products-platypus.json):
| SKU | Name |
|-----|------|
| ADYS400073-062.BLK | Mens Cure Shoes |
| ADYS400073-XKRK.BLK | Mens Cure Shoes |
| ADYS400073-111.WHT | Mens Cure Shoes |
| 302361WNW.WHT | Mens Net Shoes |
| 26422322.PNK | 1461 Patent Leather Oxford Shoes |
| 300660XKSK.BLK | Mens Pure Shoes |
| 300660XKWS.BLK | Mens Pure Shoes |
| 27875001.BLK | 1460 Bex Squared Toe Leather Shoes |
| ADYS400094XKWR.BLK | Mens Pure Shoes |

item.name: Step 3a – Add Configurable Product to Cart

request.description:
Adds the configurable product to the cart using the parent + variant SKUs resolved in Steps 1–2.

All products in `products-platypus.json` are `productType: configurable`, so use this step (not 3b).

item.name: Step 3b – Add Simple Product to Cart (alternative)

request.description: Alternative to Step 3a — only needed for `productType: simple`. Skip for Platypus (all products are configurable).

item.name: Step 4 – Set Guest Email on Cart

request.description: Associates a guest email with the cart. Required by Magento before shipping/payment steps.

item.name: Step 5 – Set Shipping Address on Cart

exec: var cart = res.data && res.data.setShippingAddressesOnCart ? res.data.setShippingAddressesOnCart.cart : null;
console.error('[Step 5] No home-delivery method found. All methods:', JSON.stringify(methods.map(function(m) { return m.carrier_code; })));

request.description:
Sets shipping address (Sydney CBD – addr-001 from addresses.json) and returns available methods.

Test script auto-saves `{{carrierCode}}` + `{{methodCode}}`, filtering out pickup/click-and-collect carriers (mirrors `PICKUP_CARRIER_CODES` in `place-order.ts`).

**Address used (addr-001):** John Smith · 123 George Street · Sydney NSW 2000 · AU · 0412345678

item.name: Step 6 – Set Shipping Method on Cart

exec: var cart = res.data && res.data.setShippingMethodsOnCart ? res.data.setShippingMethodsOnCart.cart : null;
var cart = res.data && res.data.setShippingMethodsOnCart ? res.data.setShippingMethodsOnCart.cart : null;

request.description: Selects the shipping method resolved by Step 5's test script. Uses `{{carrierCode}}` and `{{methodCode}}` collection variables.

item.name: Step 7 – Set Billing Address on Cart

exec: console.log('[Step 7] billing =', billing ? billing.firstname + ' ' + billing.lastname + ', ' + billing.city : 'N/A');

request.description: Sets billing address same as shipping (mirrors `billingAddress ?? shippingAddress` fallback in `place-order.ts`).

item.name: Step 8 – Set Payment Method on Cart

exec: var cart = res.data && res.data.setPaymentMethodOnCart ? res.data.setPaymentMethodOnCart.cart : null;

request.description:
Sets payment method. Default `{{paymentMethod}}` = `checkmo`.

If `checkmo` fails, check the console output for `available_payment_methods` and update the `paymentMethod` collection variable accordingly.

exec: var orderNumber = res.data && res.data.placeOrder ? res.data.placeOrder.order.order_number : null;
console.error('[Step 9] No order number in response:', JSON.stringify(res));

request.description:
⚠️ **STAGING ONLY** – No real charges but the order IS recorded in Magento.

Executes the final `placeOrder` mutation. On success, `{{lastOrderNumber}}` is auto-saved to collection variables.

Do NOT run against production without setting `ENABLE_PLACE_ORDER=true` and `PRODUCTION_CONFIRMED=true` (matches safety flags in `place-order.ts`).
